caption: A man and a woman are seated in wooden chairs on a stage against a dark background with purple lighting. The man has curly dark hair and a beard, wearing a white long-sleeved button-down shirt and dark trousers. He is gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The woman has blonde hair tied back and wears a dark t-shirt with the text "20'S IN YOUR" visible on the front. She sits attentively, looking toward the man with her hands resting in her lap. Between them and in front of them are white electronic devices. As the scene progresses, the man continues to talk and shift his hand positions, while the woman remains still and focused on him. The lighting and background remain constant throughout the sequence.
